games.name: BLOUNCERROOZAL
games.description: Casino chip brick-breaker. Smash gold and silver chips with a shrinking paddle, catch falling chips to trigger multiball mayhem. Score scales with chip value.
games.controls: Mouse or ← → to move · Click or Space to launch · Catch falling chips for multiball

games.name: shootin n crackin
games.description: Pizza Slice vs the IRS. Your bouncing lasers shred briefcase auditors while you dodge the audit boss every 30 seconds. Waves get faster.
games.controls: Arrow keys or WASD to move · Space to shoot · Lasers bounce off walls

games.name: the wildcard
games.description: Bachelorette party choose-your-own-adventure. You are the wild card. There are multiple endings. You will probably earn most of them.
games.controls: Click choices to advance the story

games.name: Stump Grandpa
games.description: 18-pair memory match against a cantankerous grandpa who heckles your mistakes, drains patience over time, and occasionally shuffles the cards when you miss.
games.controls: Click cards to flip · Match all pairs before Grandpa loses patience

games.name: Rock Em Sock Em Wrecking Ball
games.description: Uncle Earl takes on the HOA board in a fists-vs-clipboards brawl. Punch the suit-wearing enforcers before they reach you. Score 300 to flip the table.
games.controls: ← → or A/D to move · Space/Z/X or button to punch

games.name: Smithereens
games.description: Turn-based artillery. Adjust angle, charge your shot, and blast TANGO into lawn confetti. Wind changes every round. Four weapons to choose from.
games.controls: ← → to adjust angle · Hold Space/Fire to charge · 1–4 to switch weapons

games.name: Yedric Bombs
games.description: Yedric the yeti shreds the mountain — dodging pines, boulders, and robot impostors on the way to the finish. Hit ramps for big air, thread gates for bonus points.
games.controls: ← → or A/D to steer · Tilt phone to steer · Hit jumps to clear trees and rocks

games.name: Yeti Run
games.description: Help Yedric escape the mountain. Jump over snowmen, dodge wayward skiers, and outrun avalanche boulders. Double-jump allowed. The mountain always wins. Eventually.
games.controls: Space or ↑ to jump · Double-jump for extra height · Tap anywhere on mobile

games.name: Hognose
games.description: Dr. Hognose PhD needs 25 graduation caps. Slither the dramatic hognose snake through the grid, collect caps, and don't eat your own tail. She will huff at you if you fail.
games.controls: Arrow keys or WASD to slither · Swipe or D-pad on mobile · Don't eat your tail

games.name: Burnin' Glory
games.description: Jungle Rally Championship. Pilot the navy kart through a dirt-road jungle circuit — overtake rivals, dodge oncoming traffic, and reach 5000 points to cross the finish line.
games.controls: ← → or A/D to steer · Space or button to boost · Overtake rivals for points

games.name: Tippity Toes
games.description: Bun-Bun the Easter Bunny is tip-toeing through the egg basket. Clear the field without cracking a single egg.
games.controls: Click to reveal · Right-click or long-press to flag a rabbit

games.name: Coeur Brisé
games.description: A game of polite betrayal at a Parisian card table. Avoid hearts and the Queen of Spades — or shoot the moon.
games.controls: Click cards to select · Click Pass to confirm · Click to play a card

games.name: Oligarch's Dilemma
games.description: 16 sealed cases. One holds your fortune. Elon the Banker phones in lowball offers. Greed is a strategy.
games.controls: Click cases to open · Deal or No Deal to respond to offers

games.name: Frosty Freefall
games.description: Catch falling snowman parts in your mitten to rebuild Frosty — and dodge everything else.
games.controls: ← → arrows to move · Swipe or tilt on mobile

games.name: Rack Attack
games.description: Frat basement. Ten red cups a side. You vs. Chad. Sink all his cups before he sinks yours.
games.controls: ← → to aim · Hold Space to charge · Release to throw

games.name: Fly by the Seat of Your Pants
games.description: You're Rogue One, threading a canyon in a TIE fighter. Dodge the walls, shoot the asteroids, survive.
games.controls: Arrows or WASD to fly · Space to fire

games.name: Chop Till You Drop
games.description: Benny the Beaver chops a tree before the stamina bar runs dry. Dodge branches labeled with rivals.

games.name: Penalty Panic
games.description: Best of 5 from the spot. Pick your nation, aim your shot, and dive to save. Win it for your country.
games.controls: Drag to aim · Hold Space to charge shot · Arrows to choose dive direction when defending
